<think> The show Beauty and the Geek was first aired in the UK on E4, which is a channel that is part of the Channel 4 network. The show was a format that was successful in the US, and the UK version had a voiceover by David Mitchell, who is known for his work on the British sitcom Peep Show. Peep Show was broadcast on Channel 4. Therefore, I can infer that the year Peep Show ended its run on Channel 4 is likely the same year the UK version of Beauty and the Geek was first aired, as the voiceover for Beauty and the Geek was provided by David Mitchell, who was a part of Peep Show. Since the UK version of Beauty and the Geek first aired in 2006, I can conclude that Peep Show ended its run on Channel 4 in 2006. </think>
<answer> 2006 </answer>
